ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hedge_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hedge fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the hedge fund */,
  "fund_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund manager */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of the hedge fund (e.g., Equity, Fixed Income) */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date the fund was established */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets under management in the fund */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the fund */,
  "leverage_ratio" REAL /* Leverage ratio of the fund */,
  "performance_fee" REAL /* Performance fee charged by the fund */,
  "risk_rating" TEXT /* Risk rating of the fund */,
  "last_reported_value_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reported value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hedge_funds_fund_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_manager_id") REFERENCES fund_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fund manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the manager started managing the fund */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the manager stopped managing the fund (if applicable) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the fund manager */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the fund manager */,
  "last_performance_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hedge fund */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "shares_held" INTEGER /* Number of shares held */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the holding */,
  "percentage_of_portfolio" REAL /* Percentage of the fund's portfolio */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date the holding was reported */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the holding */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were purchased */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the shares */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last price of the shares */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the price */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the holding (e.g., active, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES hedge_funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "last_financial_report_date" TEXT /* Date of the last financial report */,
  "stock_exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarterly_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holding */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter the change occurred (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  "change_in_shares" INTEGER /* Change in the number of shares held */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the number of shares held */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change in shares */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the change was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterly_changes_holding_id FOREIGN KEY ("holding_id") REFERENCES portfolio_holdings ("holding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holding */,
  "ownership_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of ownership in the company */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date the ownership percentage was reported */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ownership data */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ownership data has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_holding_id FOREIGN KEY ("holding_id") REFERENCES portfolio_holdings ("holding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fund manager, analyst, investor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holding being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_holding_id FOREIGN KEY ("holding_id") REFERENCES portfolio_holdings ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hedge fund */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "confidentiality_level" TEXT /* Confidentiality level of the report */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups the report was shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES hedge_funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete, create) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's device */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date the data was last synchronized */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the data source */,
  "last_sync_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the last sync */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the sync (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration log */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the data was integrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the integration */,
  "records_synced" INTEGER /* Number of records synced */,
  "error_details" TEXT /* Details of any errors that occurred during the sync */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integration_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)
